## How To Test

- [ ] `go test ./...` in `apps/backend`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` in `apps/frontend`
- [ ] `bun run build` in `apps/frontend`
- [ ] `bun run build` in `packages/zod`
- [ ] `bun run build && bun run gen` in `packages/openapi`
- [ ] Other:

## Screenshots Or Recordings

Add screenshots, GIFs, or short notes for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to the issue or problem being solved.
- [ ] I updated docs for any setup, workflow, or product-surface changes.
- [ ] I updated shared schemas or contracts if the API shape changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense.
- [ ] I called out follow-up work, tradeoffs, or known gaps below.

## Notes For Reviewers

Mention migrations, environment changes, rollout concerns, or intentional follow-up work here.
